title: Oat bar supplier delay
content: Primary oat bar supplier slipped from 5-day to 12-day lead time. We need a backup supplier before next promo. The team agreed to avoid promising delivery dates that depend on the delayed lot.

title: Box accuracy matters more than coupon depth
content: When packing errors spike, refunds and churn cost more than a small discount would have saved. Fix the picker workflow first.

title: CAC guardrail
content: Pause paid social campaigns if blended CAC stays above 30 dollars for 3 consecutive days. Reallocate spend to referral and email until the funnel stabilizes.

title: Enterprise pilot lead
content: Send the enterprise sample assortment by Friday, then follow up Monday with the pricing deck and food-safety packet.

title: Refund threshold
content: Orders under 25 dollars can be refunded by support. Larger refunds need ops approval so we can spot recurring packing mistakes.
